description_long: This hamburger features a deconstructed, floating arrangement of classic ingredients, each layer clearly separated and visible. The top bun is a light brown, smooth dome, followed by a layer of sliced pickles and a thick slice of tomato. Beneath the tomato, a large, leafy green lettuce sits above a dark brown beef patty topped with a slice of melted yellow cheese. The bottom bun is rounded and slightly larger than the top. No packaging or sesame seeds are present, and the ingredients are visually distinct with vibrant colors and a glossy finish on some surfaces.
description: A visually separated hamburger with floating layers of bun, pickles, tomato, lettuce, cheese, and patty, all clearly visible and colorful.
description_view_0: The hamburger is seen from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the top bun, pickles, and tomato, with the lettuce and cheese visible below.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the tomato and lettuce layers, with the pickles and top bun partially visible and the cheese and patty below.
description_view_2: The lettuce appears most prominent, with the tomato and pickles above and the cheese and patty below, showing the side profile of the layers.
description_view_3: The tomato and lettuce are most visible, with the top bun and pickles receding, and the cheese and patty seen at the bottom.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Pickles are layered above a tomato slice, which sits on a large lettuce leaf, followed by a cheese slice atop the patty. The ingredients are evenly spaced and clearly separated.
